widgets_values: CCSR model used for CCSR. Get it on their github page.

Tiled diffusion methods tends to create color shifts. We want our colors to be consistent. This node fixes the colors.

No need to upscale the color reference image, the node already does this internally.
Limit size to 4096 on the longest edge - 4k.
Play with the denoise value. The higher the denoise, more "detail" it adds.
Get filename from input file. This will be used for the output files.
Display input image dimensions for reference.
Controlnet model to guide the diffusion.
Upscale model to bring us to 8k. NMKD 8x Faces works really good. You can try other upscale models.

SD Ultimate upscale brings us to 8k

I recommend Boltnin HyperD or Realviz XL Lightning but you can try other models.

blur strength 2 - 4 gives good results depending on content
high sharpness but large halo
needs more experimentation

Cinematic, High Contrast, highly detailed, taken using a Canon EOS R camera, hyper detailed photo - realistic maximum detail, 32k, Color Grading, ultra HD, extreme meticulous detailing, skin pore detailing, hyper sharpness, perfect without deformations

painting, oil painting, illustration, drawing, art, sketch, oil painting, cartoon, CG Style, 3D render, unreal engine, blurring, dirty, messy, worst quality, low quality, frames, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, deformed, lowres, over-smooth
Upscale factor by 2 brings us to 8K

SUPIR Sampler

Restore EDM sampler gives the best results in my testing. Even though the recommended settings for Realviz XL is 6 steps - it stills leaves a lot of noise. 24 steps gives the best quality.
Base model for SUPIR upscale. Realvis XL and Boltning works well. You can try other models.

photograph of beautiful a (((Victorian French woman))) walking on the meadows smiling, half Japanese half danish woman, Danish woman, white Caucasian woman, Nordic woman, chic bob cut hair, perfect eyes, brown eyes, big breasts, huge cleavage, seductive, sexy, Victorian red lace clothing highly detailed, sky clouds, meadow grass background, Victorian era,

polaroid, film, photography, fashion photography, award-winning photography, aesthetic and beauty, skillful details, no blur, f/1.4, innovative, lens flare, female, vogue cover style,  vibrant (lofi, analog, kodak film)

There is a resolution to upscale factor relationship in CCSR.

If your input image is in the SDXL resolution range, a factor of 2 - 3 is the sweet spot. At a factor of 4, you'll start getting ugly details.

If your input image is over 2K, an upscale of 4 works best.

BOLTNING HYPER D

sampling methods:

ccsr = normal, untiled, heavy on VRAM

ccsr_tiled_mixdiff = tiled, each tile decoded separately, has seams

ccsr_tiled_vae_gaussian_weights = seams fixed, can be less accurate and introduce extra noise
